iap.title: Subscribe
iap.autoRenewalDisclosure: Subscriptions renew automatically. Your Apple ID will be charged at purchase, and renewed at the same price within 24 hours before the end of each period unless cancelled beforehand. You can manage or cancel anytime in your App Store account settings.
iap.successAlert: Subscription successful. Your membership is now active.
iap.pendingApproval: Purchase is pending approval and will be applied once approved.
iap.verifyFailed: Could not verify your purchase, please try again.
iap.restoreFailed: Could not restore purchases, please try again.
iap.manageBody: Your subscription is managed by the App Store. View the renewal date or cancel in Settings.
iap.renewOffWarn: Your membership ends on {{date}} — no further charges
iap.inviteRewardCard: Invite friends — you both get {{days}} days

purchase.title: Purchase Plan
purchase.paymentConfirmHint: After completing payment, please click the button below to confirm the result.
purchase.selectPlanToRenew: Please select a plan to renew and restore access to cloud nodes.
purchase.completeFirstPurchase: Complete first purchase to use cloud nodes
purchase.currentlyInTrial: You are currently on trial. Complete first purchase to access cloud node service.
purchase.friendReferralBonus: Friend Referral Exclusive: Get {{days}} extra days on this order! Automatically credited after purchase, claim your exclusive benefit now!

features.zeroMaintenanceDesc: No server setup needed, works out of the box
features.routerAccessDesc: One router covers all home devices

purchase.getPlansListFailedRetry: Failed to get plans list, please try again
purchase.createOrderFailed: Failed to create order, please try again
purchase.createOrderFailedNetwork: Failed to create order, please check network connection and try again
purchase.inviteRewardDesc: Get {{days}} extra days after your first purchase
purchase.tierLocked: Your current tier is {{tier}}. This plan requires a different tier — please contact support to switch tiers.

deviceInstall.title: Client Download
deviceInstall.platformSupport: Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and more
deviceInstall.scanToDownload: Scan QR code to visit download page
deviceInstall.multiDeviceSync: Log in with the same account on different devices to enjoy multi-device sync service
deviceInstall.contactSupport: For technical support, please contact customer service
deviceInstall.shareText: Overleap — Fast & secure VPN. Download here:
deviceInstall.androidInstallCardDesc: Connect via USB, step-by-step guided, auto-install to your phone

androidInstall.title: Android USB Install
androidInstall.subtitle: Install the app to your Android phone via USB cable
androidInstall.desktopOnly: This feature is only available on desktop
androidInstall.step1Desc: Follow the image guide below to enable "Developer Options" and "USB Debugging" on your phone
androidInstall.step2Desc: Connect your phone to the computer via USB, tap "Allow" on the phone prompt
androidInstall.step3Desc: Click start install, the app will be pushed to your phone automatically
androidInstall.noDeviceHint: Please check that USB cable is connected and debugging is authorized on your phone
androidInstall.usbTrustPrompt: Please tap "Allow USB Debugging" on your phone screen
androidInstall.tapAllowOnPhone: Tap "Allow" on the popup on your phone to authorize
androidInstall.tapAllowDetail: A dialog "Allow USB debugging?" will appear on your phone. Check "Always allow" and tap "Allow"
androidInstall.checkCable: You're using a data cable (not a charge-only cable)
androidInstall.checkMtp: Phone connection mode is set to "File Transfer"
androidInstall.checkUsbDebug: USB debugging was enabled in Step 1
androidInstall.otherBrandHint: General steps: Settings → About Phone → Tap Build Number 7 times → Back to Settings → Developer Options → Enable USB Debugging
androidInstall.xiaomi_step4: Tap "MIUI Version" 7 times until you see developer mode enabled
androidInstall.vivo_step4: Tap "Software Version" 7 times until you see developer mode enabled
androidInstall.oppo_step1: Settings → About Phone → Tap "Build Number" 7 times
androidInstall.oppo_step2: Back to Settings → Other Settings → Developer Options → Enable "USB Debugging"
androidInstall.samsung_step1: Settings → About Device → Tap "Build Number" 7-10 times
androidInstall.samsung_step2: Back to Settings → Developer Options → Enable "USB Debugging"
